title: Decompose: extract a sidebar from a LiveView
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/components/sidebar.ex (module MyAppWeb.Sidebar). Define a function component sidebar/1 with attrs :items (list, required) and :active (string, required), and render <aside> with <.link :for={item <- @items} navigate={item.path} class={["nav-item", item.slug == @active && "active"]}>{item.label}</.link></aside>. This is a stateless decomposition — no events.
tier_rationale: One-step extraction of a stateless navigation component.
